chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-702 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.3028/2019 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case 22.1.2026 Mr. Ghulam Akbar Lashari advocate for the respondent / SBCA --------------------- None present for the petitioner. This is an old petition of 2019, which is almost seven years ago. It was lastly fixed on 09.10.2019, thereafter no any progress has been made in the matter. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition vigilantly, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed / pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
